case_title: INTERNATIONAL BROTHERHOOD OF ELECTRICAL WORKERS VS. DAVID RUSSELL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $760.00 FILED BY INTERNATIONAL BROTHERHOOD OF ELECTRICAL WORKERS LOCAL 6 AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSELL, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED FEB-22-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSELL, DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY WHEN CASE CALLED AT 11:35 AM. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT IN COURT THIS MORNING, BUT LEFT AND DID NOT INFORM THE COURT, CLERK, OR PLAINTIFF THAT HE WAS LEAVING. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL BROTHERHOOD OF ELECTRICAL WORKERS LOCAL 6 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUSSELL, DAVID $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $835.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
